title: phaiophleps nigricans
intro: Phaiophleps nigricans, also known as Black-flowered Phaiophleps, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Phaiophleps nigricans are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
